CustomField.description: MIS-4567 used in the Related Account screen flow to sort accounts by Stage
CustomField.formula: IF( text(Stage__c) = 'Paying Account', CASE( Status__c, 'Active', 1, 'Cancelled', 2, 'Expired', 3, 'Suspended', 4, 0 ), 0 ) + Case( Stage__c, 'Trial / NT / One-time', 5, 'Deal in Closing Pipeline', 6, 'Early Stage Pipeline', 7, 'Pre Pipeline', 8, 'Pending Meeting', 9, 'Ongoing Outbound', 10, 'New', 11, 0 )
CustomField.label: Account Stage Number Sort
